summary: Complete testing of Report Generator feature for Climate Risk Platform. All 11 backend API tests passed. All 6 frontend features verified working via Playwright automation.
seed_data_creation: Used existing portfolios (Sample Climate Risk Portfolio with 16 assets) and WITCH 1.5C hub scenario from previous test iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report Generator feature fully tested and working. Generates PDF (reportlab), Excel (openpyxl), and CSV reports from impact analysis. Reports stored in /app/backend/reports_output/. All endpoints at /api/v1/analysis/reports/generate and /api/v1/analysis/reports/download/{filename} working correctly.
passed_tests: TestReportGeneratePDF::test_generate_pdf_returns_filename_and_download_url - POST /api/v1/analysis/reports/generate with format=pdf returns .pdf filename and download_url
TestReportDownload::test_download_pdf_returns_actual_file - GET /api/v1/analysis/reports/download/{filename} returns valid PDF file with correct content-type
TestReportDownload::test_download_excel_returns_actual_file - Download Excel returns valid XLSX file (ZIP archive format)
TestReportDownload::test_download_csv_returns_actual_file - Download CSV returns valid CSV with 'Climate Risk Impact Report' header
TestReportGenerateErrors::test_generate_returns_400_for_empty_portfolio - Returns 400 for portfolio with no assets
/impact page shows PDF export button (data-testid='export-pdf-btn') after running impact calculation
/impact page shows Excel export button (data-testid='export-excel-btn') after running impact calculation
/impact page shows CSV export button (data-testid='export-csv-btn') after running impact calculation
PDF button click triggers report generation and opens download URL in new tab
